seo.title: Privacy Policy
seo.description: Privacy Policy for BuiltWell CT, a licensed Connecticut home improvement contractor. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
seo.og_image_alt: BuiltWell CT home remodeling contractor serving Connecticut

data.headline: Privacy Policy
data.subheadline: How BuiltWell CT collects, uses, and protects information submitted through our website and communications.

data.title: 1. Introduction
data.content: This Privacy Policy describes how BuiltWell CT, doing business as BuiltWell CT ("we," "us," or "our"), collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit our website at buildwellct.com or interact with our business. BuiltWell CT is a licensed Connecticut home improvement contractor (CT HIC License #0668405) serving homeowners throughout Fairfield County and New Haven County, Connecticut. This policy applies to all information collected through our website, contact forms, consultation requests, and related communications.
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy describes how BuiltWell CT, doing business as BuiltWell CT ("we," "us," or "our"), collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit our website at buildwellct.com or interact with our business. BuiltWell CT is a licensed Connecticut home improvement contractor (CT HIC License #0668405) serving homeowners throughout Fairfield County and New Haven County, Connecticut. This policy applies to all information collected through our website, contact forms, consultation requests, and related communications.

subsections.title: Personal Information You Provide
paragraphs: When you submit a contact form, request a consultation, or request a project estimate through our website, we may collect the following information:
This information is collected through contact forms, consultation request forms, quote request forms, and the scheduling tool on our website.
bullets: Your name
Phone number
Email address
Home address or zip code
Project details and descriptions
Uploaded photographs or documents related to your project

subsections.title: Information Collected Automatically
paragraphs: When you visit our website, certain information is collected automatically, including:
bullets: IP address
Browser type and version
Device information, including operating system
Cookies and similar tracking technologies
Pages visited, time spent on each page, and navigation patterns
Referring website or source

data.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
bullets: Scheduling consultations and project site visits
Providing project estimates and proposals
Communicating with you about your remodeling project
Coordinating project logistics, scheduling, and subcontractor work
Improving our website experience and content

Sending marketing communications about our services, promotions, or updates. You may opt out of marketing communications at any time by contacting us at info@buildwellct.com or by following the unsubscribe instructions included in any marketing message.

Sending text messages (SMS) to the phone number you provide, only if you have given consent on a contact form, in connection with project communication or marketing. You can opt out at any time by replying STOP.
data.content: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
paragraphs: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

data.title: 4. Information Sharing
bullets: With subcontractors, tradespeople, or project partners who are directly involved in performing work on your remodeling project
With payment processors to facilitate project deposits and payments
With service providers who assist our business operations, such as website hosting providers, email platforms, and customer management tools
When required by law, legal process, court order, or government request

With third-party financing partners, including GreenSky, only when you choose to apply for project financing through one of their programs. Financing applications are processed by the lender directly and are subject to that lender's own privacy policy and credit-approval terms.
data.content: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following limited circumstances:
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following limited circumstances:
All third parties who receive your information are expected to handle it in accordance with applicable privacy laws and only for the specific purposes described above.

data.title: 5. Artificial Intelligence and Automated Tools
data.content: BuiltWell CT may use artificial intelligence and automated tools in connection with our website and business operations. We are committed to transparency regarding the use of these technologies.
paragraphs: BuiltWell CT may use artificial intelligence and automated tools in connection with our website and business operations. We are committed to transparency regarding the use of these technologies.
This policy is intended to comply with the Connecticut Data Privacy Act and related amendments governing the disclosure of artificial intelligence and automated processing tools.
For more information, see Connecticut Public Act No. 25-113, available through the Connecticut General Assembly website.
bullets: Some images displayed on this website may be generated or enhanced using artificial intelligence tools.
Certain written content on this website may be created or assisted using AI writing and editing tools.

Customer inquiries submitted through website forms may be processed using secure software platforms that may incorporate automated or AI assisted tools to help organize, route, or respond to submissions.
AI tools are used to improve efficiency, communication quality, and the overall website experience for visitors and customers.
Personal data submitted through forms on this website is used only for legitimate business purposes, including responding to your inquiry, scheduling consultations, and coordinating project work.
Customer data is not sold or distributed to third parties for unrelated marketing purposes.
AI tools may assist in processing and organizing communications, but final decisions regarding project estimates, scheduling, and customer service matters are made by company personnel.

data.title: 6. Cookies and Analytics
data.content: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve your browsing experience and to understand how visitors interact with our content.
paragraphs: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve your browsing experience and to understand how visitors interact with our content.

You can manage cookie settings through your browser preferences. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies, although doing so may affect your experience on certain parts of our website. For more information about how Google collects and processes data, visit Google's privacy policy.
bullets: We use Google Analytics to collect anonymous data about website traffic, visitor behavior, and content performance. Google Analytics uses cookies to track page views, session duration, and referral sources.
Session cookies are used to maintain your browsing session and ensure the website functions properly.
Performance and analytics cookies help us understand which pages are most useful and how visitors navigate through the site.

data.title: 7. Data Security
data.content: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Our security practices include:
paragraphs: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Our security practices include:

While we strive to protect your personal information, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is completely secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security but are committed to implementing reasonable data protection measures appropriate for our business.
bullets: SSL (Secure Sockets Layer) encryption on all pages of our website
Secure storage of customer data through reputable third party service providers
Limited access to personal information, restricted to authorized personnel who need the data to perform their job responsibilities
Use of third party service providers that maintain their own data security standards and compliance programs

data.title: 8. Data Retention
data.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy or as required by law. Project related records, including customer contact information and project documentation, are retained for a reasonable period following project completion to support warranty obligations, respond to follow up inquiries, and comply with Connecticut record keeping requirements for licensed home improvement contractors. When personal data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or anonymized.
paragraphs: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy or as required by law. Project related records, including customer contact information and project documentation, are retained for a reasonable period following project completion to support warranty obligations, respond to follow up inquiries, and comply with Connecticut record keeping requirements for licensed home improvement contractors. When personal data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or anonymized.

data.title: 9. Your Rights
paragraphs: You have the right to:
To exercise any of these rights, please contact us by email at info@buildwellct.com. We will respond to your request within a reasonable timeframe in accordance with applicable law.
bullets: Access the personal data we hold about you
Request correction of any inaccurate or incomplete information
Request deletion of your personal data, subject to any legal retention requirements

data.title: 10. Third Party Links
data.content: Our website may contain links to external websites that are not operated by BuiltWell CT. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these third party websites. We encourage you to review the privacy policy of any external website you visit through links on our site.
paragraphs: Our website may contain links to external websites that are not operated by BuiltWell CT. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these third party websites. We encourage you to review the privacy policy of any external website you visit through links on our site.

data.title: 11. Children's Privacy
data.content: Our website and services are not directed at individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have inadvertently collected personal data from a child under 13, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.
paragraphs: Our website and services are not directed at individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have inadvertently collected personal data from a child under 13, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

data.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
data.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technologies, legal requirements, or other factors. When we make changes, we will update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we collect, use, and protect your information.
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technologies, legal requirements, or other factors. When we make changes, we will update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we collect, use, and protect your information.

data.title: 13. Contact Us
data.content: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, or if you wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us:
paragraphs: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, or if you wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us:
BuiltWell CT
206A Boston Post Road
Orange, Connecticut 06477
Email: info@buildwellct.com
You may also reach us through the website contact form at buildwellct.com/contact/.
